Reset History — Fleet 6

🔐 Administrative Controls

ℹ️ How the weekly cycle works: Click 📤 Pull on a part after you've ordered it — it stays visible to users (marked Submitted) so they know it was received. Every Monday at 8:00 AM the app automatically moves submitted items to history. Anything still pending becomes a Backorder on the My Order tab — add a note explaining the delay or ETA so the crew knows the status.
Current Week's Order
Click Pull as items are physically pulled / ordered. Backorder notes are edited on the My Order tab.

📤 Export Current Order

Export the current week's Fleet 6 parts order for printing or saving. Includes all departments, quantities, Oracle & SAGE numbers.

📦 Master Parts List Management

Upload New Oracle Extract (.xlsx)
No file selected
Pick a file and you'll see a preview where you can verify columns and choose how to apply: Merge (default — adds new + updates existing), Add only, Update only, or Replace. Layout doesn't have to be exact — auto-detection handles different column orders, header names ("Item Number" / "Part Number" / "P/N" etc.), and multi-sheet workbooks.

Datavan Department

⚠️ Heads Up Datavan supplies (paper plates, utensils, cleaning products, Lysol, glass cleaner, etc.) still need to be entered separately through the Teams Request Page.

This app covers parts orders only. Make sure to submit your supplies request through Teams before your weekly deadline.
